title: Silent Treatment Screens at the 48 Hour Film Project
excerpt: Our latest film screened last Wednesday in Group D alongside a wonderful lineup. Audience award results coming this week.

title: Silent Treatment Nominated for 7 Awards — and We Won One
excerpt: We are beyond honored to have received 7 nominations at the Boston 48 Hour Film Project, including Best Picture, Best Cinematography, and Best Acting. And we took home Best Acting Ensemble.
